documentation.file_docstring: Voice call response generator - uses the embedded Pi agent for tool support. Routes voice responses through the same agent infrastructure as messaging.
inline_comments: Generate a voice response using the embedded Pi agent with full tool support. Uses the same agent infrastructure as messaging for consistent behavior.
Build voice-specific session key based on phone number
Resolve agent identity for personalized prompt
Build system prompt with conversation history

functions.name: generateVoiceResponse
functions.doc: Generate a voice response using the embedded Pi agent with full tool support.   Uses the same agent infrastructure as me
